evaluated_on: Web-IDS23 test split · Ensemble (RF×0.4 + XGB×0.6) · per-phase feature sets

phase_1.label: Phase 1 — Binary Detection
phase_1.description: Benign vs Attack gatekeeper (16 features, behaviour-based)

phase_3.label: Phase 3 — RF + Open-Set Recognition
phase_3.description: Fine-grained 6-class + novel detection via Max-Softmax OSR (14 features)
phase_3.note: ROC-AUC and PR-AUC reflect open-world novel detection (held-out RevShell, SSRF, XSS, SSH), not closed-world classification.
